errors.timeout: Market data provider request timed out.
errors.emptyResponse: The market data provider returned no candles for this asset.
errors.providerUnavailable: Market data provider is currently unavailable.

common.disclaimer: This is not financial advice. It is an automated reading based on technical patterns.

opportunities.title: Opportunity ranking
opportunities.subtitle: Analyze multiple assets and select the best result to open it on the chart.

timeframes.title: Multi-timeframe confirmation
timeframes.subtitle: Compare the same asset across different timeframes to check reading alignment.

simulation.title: Historical simulation
simulation.subtitle: Validate recent signals using the available candles for this asset and timeframe.

calibration.title: Score calibration
calibration.subtitle: Informational adjustments calculated from historical simulation.

history.title: Recent history
history.subtitle: Analyses saved locally in this browser.

watchlist.title: Watchlist
watchlist.subtitle: Assets saved locally for quick access.

risk.title: Risk management
risk.unavailable: Risk plan unavailable without valid entry and stop.

scanner.title: Technical Scanner
scanner.subtitle: Automated suggestions based on technical patterns, structure and price action.

patterns.title: Detected patterns
patterns.empty: No relevant pattern detected on the current candle.

hammer.name: Hammer
hammer.reason: Hammer after a downtrend, with long lower shadow and seller rejection.

invertedHammer.name: Inverted Hammer
invertedHammer.reason: Inverted hammer after a decline, with long upper shadow and a possible reversal attempt.

hangingMan.name: Hanging Man
hangingMan.reason: Hanging man after an advance, with long lower shadow and possible buyer exhaustion.

shootingStar.name: Shooting Star
shootingStar.reason: Shooting star after an uptrend, with buyer rejection at the top.

doji.name: Doji
doji.reason: Opening and closing nearly equal, indicating indecision.

longLeggedDoji.name: Long-Legged Doji
longLeggedDoji.reason: Doji with long shadows on both sides, indicating strong indecision and volatility.

dragonflyDoji.name: Dragonfly Doji
dragonflyDoji.reason: Doji with a long lower shadow, suggesting seller rejection and possible bullish reversal.

gravestoneDoji.name: Gravestone Doji
gravestoneDoji.reason: Doji with a long upper shadow, suggesting buyer rejection and possible bearish reversal.

spinningTop.name: Spinning Top
spinningTop.reason: Small-body candle with relevant shadows, indicating balance and indecision.

bullishMarubozu.name: Bullish Marubozu
bullishMarubozu.reason: Wide bullish candle with minimal shadows, indicating strong buyer pressure.

bearishMarubozu.name: Bearish Marubozu
bearishMarubozu.reason: Wide bearish candle with minimal shadows, indicating strong seller pressure.

bullishKicker.name: Bullish Kicker
bullishKicker.reason: Sharp bullish shift with a gap and strong buyer candle after a seller candle.

bearishKicker.name: Bearish Kicker
bearishKicker.reason: Sharp bearish shift with a gap and strong seller candle after a buyer candle.

threeWhiteSoldiers.name: Three White Soldiers
threeWhiteSoldiers.reason: Sequence of three strong bullish candles, suggesting renewed bullish strength.

threeBlackCrows.name: Three Black Crows
threeBlackCrows.reason: Sequence of three strong bearish candles, suggesting renewed bearish strength.

risingThreeMethods.name: Rising Three Methods
risingThreeMethods.reason: Bullish continuation with a short pause inside the range followed by renewed buyer pressure.

fallingThreeMethods.name: Falling Three Methods
fallingThreeMethods.reason: Bearish continuation with a short pause inside the range followed by renewed seller pressure.

matHold.name: Mat Hold
matHold.reason: Bullish continuation with a gap, controlled pause above the first candle and buyer recovery.

bullishSeparatingLines.name: Bullish Separating Lines
bullishSeparatingLines.reason: Bullish continuation with a buyer candle opening near the previous one and resuming trend direction.

bearishSeparatingLines.name: Bearish Separating Lines
bearishSeparatingLines.reason: Bearish continuation with a seller candle opening near the previous one and resuming trend direction.

upsideTasukiGap.name: Upside Tasuki Gap
upsideTasukiGap.reason: Bullish continuation gap partially tested by a seller candle without closing the window.

downsideTasukiGap.name: Downside Tasuki Gap
downsideTasukiGap.reason: Bearish continuation gap partially tested by a buyer candle without closing the window.

onNeck.name: On Neck
onNeck.reason: Bearish continuation with weak buyer reaction closing near the previous seller close.

inNeck.name: In Neck
inNeck.reason: Bearish continuation with a short buyer reaction still below the midpoint of the seller candle.

thrusting.name: Thrusting
thrusting.reason: Bearish continuation with partial recovery into the previous body without invalidating seller pressure.

bullishBreakawayGap.name: Bullish Breakaway Gap
bullishBreakawayGap.reason: Bullish gap after a bearish trend, suggesting breakout and a pressure shift.

bearishBreakawayGap.name: Bearish Breakaway Gap
bearishBreakawayGap.reason: Bearish gap after a bullish trend, suggesting breakout and a pressure shift.

runawayGapUp.name: Runaway Gap Up
runawayGapUp.reason: Bullish continuation gap in trend direction, indicating buyer acceleration.

runawayGapDown.name: Runaway Gap Down
runawayGapDown.reason: Bearish continuation gap in trend direction, indicating seller acceleration.

exhaustionGapUp.name: Exhaustion Gap Up
exhaustionGapUp.reason: Upside gap in an extended trend with rejection, suggesting possible buyer exhaustion.

exhaustionGapDown.name: Exhaustion Gap Down
exhaustionGapDown.reason: Downside gap in an extended trend with rejection, suggesting possible seller exhaustion.

gapFillBullish.name: Bullish Gap Fill
gapFillBullish.reason: Bearish gap filled by price recovery, suggesting buyer reaction.

gapFillBearish.name: Bearish Gap Fill
gapFillBearish.reason: Bullish gap filled by price rejection, suggesting seller reaction.

islandReversalBottom.name: Island Reversal Bottom
islandReversalBottom.reason: Bottom island reversal with an entry gap and an exit gap to the upside.

islandReversalTop.name: Island Reversal Top
islandReversalTop.reason: Top island reversal with an entry gap and an exit gap to the downside.

bullishEngulfing.name: Bullish Engulfing
bullishEngulfing.reason: Bullish engulfing after a decline, with buyer candle engulfing the previous body.

bearishEngulfing.name: Bearish Engulfing
bearishEngulfing.reason: Bearish engulfing after a rally, with seller candle engulfing the previous body.

bullishHarami.name: Bullish Harami
bullishHarami.reason: Small bullish candle contained inside the previous body after a decline, suggesting seller slowdown.

bearishHarami.name: Bearish Harami
bearishHarami.reason: Small bearish candle contained inside the previous body after an advance, suggesting buyer slowdown.

piercingLine.name: Piercing Line
piercingLine.reason: Two-candle bullish reversal with close above the midpoint of the previous bearish candle.

darkCloudCover.name: Dark Cloud Cover
darkCloudCover.reason: Two-candle bearish reversal with close below the midpoint of the previous bullish candle.

morningStar.name: Morning Star
morningStar.reason: Three-candle bullish reversal with indecision followed by buyer recovery.

eveningStar.name: Evening Star
eveningStar.reason: Three-candle bearish reversal with indecision followed by seller recovery.

tweezerBottom.name: Tweezer Bottom
tweezerBottom.reason: Similar lows after a decline, indicating price defense and possible reversal.

tweezerTop.name: Tweezer Top
tweezerTop.reason: Similar highs after an advance, indicating rejection and possible reversal.

insideBar.name: Inside Bar
insideBar.reason: Current candle contained within the previous, indicating compression before a breakout.

bullishFvg.name: Bullish FVG
bullishFvg.reason: Bullish inefficiency across three candles: third candle low above first candle high.

bearishFvg.name: Bearish FVG
bearishFvg.reason: Bearish inefficiency across three candles: third candle high below first candle low.

bullishBos.name: Bullish BOS
bullishBos.reason: Close broke the last confirmed swing high, indicating a bullish structure break.

bearishBos.name: Bearish BOS
bearishBos.reason: Close broke the last confirmed swing low, indicating a bearish structure break.

bullishChoch.name: Bullish CHOCH
bullishChoch.reason: Change of character: bearish structure reversed by breaking a relevant swing high.

bearishChoch.name: Bearish CHOCH
bearishChoch.reason: Change of character: bullish structure reversed by breaking a relevant swing low.

higherHigh.name: Higher High
higherHigh.reason: Higher high than the previous one, confirming bullish market structure.

higherLow.name: Higher Low
higherLow.reason: Higher low than the previous one, sustaining the uptrend.

lowerHigh.name: Lower High
lowerHigh.reason: Lower high than the previous one, confirming bearish market structure.

lowerLow.name: Lower Low
lowerLow.reason: Lower low than the previous one, sustaining the downtrend.

doubleTop.name: Double Top
doubleTop.reason: Two similar highs with a neckline break, suggesting a bearish reversal.

doubleBottom.name: Double Bottom
doubleBottom.reason: Two similar lows with a neckline break, suggesting a bullish reversal.

tripleTop.name: Triple Top
tripleTop.reason: Three similar highs with a neckline break, suggesting a stronger bearish reversal.

tripleBottom.name: Triple Bottom
tripleBottom.reason: Three similar lows with a neckline break, suggesting a stronger bullish reversal.

headAndShoulders.name: Head and Shoulders
headAndShoulders.reason: Top with left shoulder, higher head, and right shoulder, followed by a neckline break.

inverseHeadAndShoulders.name: Inverse Head and Shoulders
inverseHeadAndShoulders.reason: Bottom with left shoulder, lower head, and right shoulder, followed by a neckline break.

bullishFlag.name: Bullish Flag
bullishFlag.reason: Bullish continuation after a short consolidation and breakout above the range.

bearishFlag.name: Bearish Flag
bearishFlag.reason: Bearish continuation after a short consolidation and breakout below the range.

bullishPennant.name: Bullish Pennant
bullishPennant.reason: Bullish continuation after range compression and breakout above the pennant.

bearishPennant.name: Bearish Pennant
bearishPennant.reason: Bearish continuation after range compression and breakout below the pennant.

ascendingTriangle.name: Ascending Triangle
ascendingTriangle.reason: Flat resistance with ascending lows and a breakout above the resistance level.

descendingTriangle.name: Descending Triangle
descendingTriangle.reason: Flat support with descending highs and a breakout below the support level.

symmetricalTriangle.name: Symmetrical Triangle
symmetricalTriangle.reason: Compression between descending highs and ascending lows, followed by a directional breakout.

risingWedge.name: Rising Wedge
risingWedge.reason: Converging ascending highs and lows losing momentum, with a breakout to the downside.

fallingWedge.name: Falling Wedge
fallingWedge.reason: Converging descending highs and lows losing selling pressure, with a breakout to the upside.

rectangleBreakoutUp.name: Rectangle Breakout Up
rectangleBreakoutUp.reason: Breakout above a consolidating lateral range.

rectangleBreakoutDown.name: Rectangle Breakout Down
rectangleBreakoutDown.reason: Breakout below a consolidating lateral range.

rangeRejectionHigh.name: Range Rejection High
rangeRejectionHigh.reason: Price touched the top of the range but closed lower, indicating a bearish reaction.

rangeRejectionLow.name: Range Rejection Low
rangeRejectionLow.reason: Price touched the bottom of the range but closed higher, indicating a bullish reaction.

channelBreakout.name: Channel Breakout
channelBreakout.reason: Price broke out of a trending price channel, signaling a potential directional acceleration.

volumeSpikeBullish.name: Volume Spike Bullish
volumeSpikeBullish.reason: Bullish candle with elevated relative volume, signaling unusual buying pressure.

volumeSpikeBearish.name: Volume Spike Bearish
volumeSpikeBearish.reason: Bearish candle with elevated relative volume, signaling unusual selling pressure.

climaxVolumeTop.name: Climax Volume Top
climaxVolumeTop.reason: Extreme volume at a top after an uptrend, suggesting possible buyer exhaustion.

climaxVolumeBottom.name: Climax Volume Bottom
climaxVolumeBottom.reason: Extreme volume at a bottom after a downtrend, suggesting possible seller exhaustion.

lowVolumePullbackBullish.name: Low Volume Pullback Bullish
lowVolumePullbackBullish.reason: Pullback on low volume within an uptrend, suggesting a healthy pause.

lowVolumePullbackBearish.name: Low Volume Pullback Bearish
lowVolumePullbackBearish.reason: Bounce on low volume within a downtrend, suggesting a healthy pause.

atrExpansionBreakout.name: ATR Expansion Breakout
atrExpansionBreakout.reason: Breakout accompanied by ATR expansion, indicating increasing directional volatility.

atrCompression.name: ATR Compression
atrCompression.reason: ATR compression, indicating reduced volatility and possible coiling before a breakout.

volatilitySqueeze.name: Volatility Squeeze
volatilitySqueeze.reason: Narrow range and volatility compression, suggesting a potential strong move ahead.

wideRangeCandle.name: Wide Range Candle
wideRangeCandle.reason: Candle with above-average range relative to ATR, indicating strength or exhaustion.

goldenCross.name: Golden Cross
goldenCross.reason: Short EMA crossed above the long EMA, signaling a bullish reversal or continuation.

deathCross.name: Death Cross
deathCross.reason: Short EMA crossed below the long EMA, signaling a bearish reversal or continuation.

emaBullishStack.name: EMA Bullish Stack
emaBullishStack.reason: Price above both EMAs with short EMA above long EMA, confirming bullish alignment.

emaBearishStack.name: EMA Bearish Stack
emaBearishStack.reason: Price below both EMAs with short EMA below long EMA, confirming bearish alignment.

maPullbackBullish.name: MA Pullback Bullish
maPullbackBullish.reason: Pullback to the moving average in an uptrend, followed by a bullish reaction.

maPullbackBearish.name: MA Pullback Bearish
maPullbackBearish.reason: Rally to the moving average in a downtrend, followed by a bearish rejection.

trendlineBreakUp.name: Trendline Break Up
trendlineBreakUp.reason: Breakout above a trendline or dynamic resistance level.

trendlineBreakDown.name: Trendline Break Down
trendlineBreakDown.reason: Breakdown below a trendline or dynamic support level.

retestSupport.name: Retest Support
retestSupport.reason: Retest of a support level with a bullish reaction.

retestResistance.name: Retest Resistance
retestResistance.reason: Retest of a resistance level with a bearish rejection.
